utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each is specified with coverage details and explicit costs: health_coverage (provider, policy number, coverage details, monthly and annual cost); property_coverage (provider, policy number, coverage details, monthly and annual cost); travel_coverage (coverage details and costs, noted as included with €0 and €0 annually, which satisfies cost requirement); additional_services (lists two services each with provider, policy number, coverage details, and costs; plus an extra discount note—costs for the two main services are present); total_budget (complete monthly/annual totals and breakdown info). Therefore, all required items are fully specified with the details requested.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Health Insurance (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health 'LifeFirst Standard Plan'), EliteHome Premium Equipment Protection (closest match in property_protection.home_content is 'EliteHome Premium Coverage'), travel coverage included in LifeFirst health (no separate item to rate), Professional Liability Package and Legal Protection Insurance (no matching items in ground-truth), and a union discount (not in ratings). Therefore, only two items can be mapped with exact ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan and EliteHome Premium Coverage.
